package.name: mserve_lidar
package.description: Lifecycle-managed LiDAR node for mServe. Wraps the vendored Slamtec RPLIDAR SDK's sl::ILidarDriver directly (not the rplidar_ros node — no apt package for it exists on this distro, and upstream's own build just globs the SDK into its node executable) so bringup/shutdown is gated the same way as mserve_drivechain/mserve_base/mserve_camera via lifecycle_manager. Publishes standard sensor_msgs/LaserScan. Targets the RPLIDAR C1.
